approvedBy: Steve continuous-builder priority + Codex Foundation builder session
approvalSource: Steve prioritized BUILD-INTEL-CREATOR-WATCHLIST-EXPANSION-001 after the Harlan operator loop, with explicit instruction to avoid live extraction, private auth, paid access, external writes, and hidden workers unless separately approved.
scopeSummary: Expand the Build Intel creator watchlist with lookup-backed source refs, source IDs/URLs, public/private/auth posture, priority, cadence, focused dogfood, verifier coverage, and no crawl/extraction/model/paid-auth/output side effects.
notApproved: Do not crawl sources, fetch transcripts, capture screenshots/keyframes, summarize videos, or call a model.
Do not write Research Inbox items, create atoms, or mutate backlog from extracted content.
Do not install, run, or integrate OpenHuman.
Do not launch Harlan runtime, UI, voice/avatar, or external writes.
Do not mutate Drive, Gmail, ClickUp, Slack, or Agent Feedback.
Do not launch hidden subagents or parallel builders.
